calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks, S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. Deberah Neville.
Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority representative, property manager: Al Hartridge present with counsel, Michael Lawson.
Defendant: Sarah Gillette present in pro per.
Counsel and parties met in chambers.
Parties reached a settlement, terms of settlement were read into the record in open court as follows:
Plaintiff will pay defendant the sum of $2,136.00 in back rent thru April 30,2003 due by the closed of business day on July 10,2003, plus the current rent of $217.00 per month. If the defendant fail to comply with the agreement, plaintiff will apply to the court an ex parte declaration for judgment of eviction, with 24 hours notice to the defendant.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
